emails.subject: Moody's Investor Service
emails.body: Kay I have had a request for an NDA for Moody's Investor Service. They have actually submitted their form for our review. Please advise is we have anything with this company in your confidentiality data base. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, EWS Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3490 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Moody's Investor Service
emails.body: RE: Moody's Investor Service Hi Mark, Tana: Nothing with or pertaining to Moody's to the best of my knowledge. Have a good holiday!
